name: Let's talk? |  Satoru Gojo
description:
«Hey, you! Yes, you, on the other side of the screen! Let's talk? Come on, you have all the power in your hands, what does a minute with me cost you, huh?»

I just decided to play around and couldn't stop, hah.

P.S. I sincerely hope that my idea will work and the bot won't break down.

I sincerely ask you to pay attention, in case of misunderstanding, to the fact that English is not my native language, so there may be mistakes or differences.

If you want me to urgently change/add something, then WRITE IT! (I'm not a telepath)

And in general I will be very grateful for feedback.❤️‍🩹

Kiss kiss
creator: Odettecoo
